nodes.name: Parse Request
nodes.notes: Extract query, months, budget_limit with safe defaults

nodes.name: Resolve Symbol
nodes.notes: Calls Python LoRA v1.2 resolver + normalize layer → {symbol, normalized, raw_output}

nodes.name: MCP: get_price_history
nodes.notes: Yahoo Finance MCP — returns current_price, period_return, high, low, avg_volume

nodes.name: MCP: get_ticker_info
nodes.notes: Yahoo Finance MCP — returns market_cap, pe_ratio, sector

nodes.name: Build Memo
nodes.notes: Assembles research memo with [1]/[2] citation markers tracing values to MCP tool calls

nodes.name: Respond to Webhook
nodes.notes: Returns {memo, symbol, normalized, raw_output, budget_used, budget_limit}
